tluaMetatableProtected.tlua(11,15): error TLUA100041: Cannot change a protected metatable.
tluaMetatableProtected.tlua(18,24): error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; b: number; }'.


==== tluaMetatableProtected.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // A __metatable member protects the metatable: getmetatable shows the sentinel instead, and
    // setmetatable refuses to change it -- the runtime raises, so the old pairing stands, the one
    // place setmetatable does not replace.
    
    local guarded = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, { __index = { a = 1 }, __metatable = "locked" });
    
    // getmetatable answers with the __metatable sentinel, not the real metatable.
    local shown: string = getmetatable(guarded);
    
    // A re-setmetatable is an error, and the old pairing survives it.
    local again = setmetatable(guarded, { __index = { b = 2 } });
                  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100041: Cannot change a protected metatable.
    local survives: number = again.a;
    
    // An unprotected table replaces normally.
    local unprotected = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, { __index = { a = 1 } });
    local replaced = setmetatable(unprotected, { __index = { b = 2 } });
    local b: number = replaced.b;
    local goneA = replaced.a;
                           ~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; b: number; }'.
